testsuite.name: com.sara.workoutforlife.walk.PixelProbeTest

testcase.name: captureSpecimens

failure.message:
java.lang.AssertionError: captureSpecimens: 2 independent failures were collected (none masked another): java.lang.AssertionError: Settings+dialog window capture must not be byte-identical to Settings window capture java.lang.AssertionError: Settings+dialog window capture must not be byte-identical to Settings window capture at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at org.junit.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:65) at com.sara.workoutforlife.walk.PixelProbeTest.captureSpecimens(PixelProbeTest.kt:530) at
